menu.title: Menu
menu.asReadyDesc: Each dish arrives as soon as it's ready.
menu.togetherDesc: Starters and drinks come out as they're ready; mains all come out together.
menu.prepayHint: Your order goes to the kitchen as soon as we confirm payment.
menu.addMoreHint: You can add more dishes during the meal.
menu.liveStatusHint: From there you can track it live and pay.
menu.nameSubtitle: This lets your friends see what you ordered and what they ordered.
menu.namePrivacy: Only shown to people at your table. We don't create an account.
menu.etaClosedShort: We're closed for now. Come back during the next service.
menu.etaSaturatedInfo: Kitchen at capacity{cap}. We can't take more orders right now.
menu.etaNormal: Based on the orders currently in the kitchen.
menu.pickupNamePlaceholder: So we can call you when it's ready
menu.demoHint: Demo mode. Enable payments to use Apple Pay.
menu.paymentApprovalHint: Your order enters the kitchen only once payment is approved.
menu.errNeedName: We need your name to call you.
menu.errNeedPhone: Enter your mobile number so we can let you know when it's ready.
menu.errApplePayInactive: Apple Pay isn't enabled for this restaurant yet.
menu.errSaturated: Kitchen at capacity (ETA {eta} min, cap {max} min). Try again in a few minutes.
menu.errClosed: We're closed for now. Come back during the next service.
menu.errDeclined: The payment was declined by the bank.
menu.sendError: We couldn't send the order. Check your connection.

reservar.closedBody: {name} is not taking online reservations right now.
